Characters:

Sandra Davis | 18 | High Scholar

Sandra was always a smart kid growing up. She has always been the mature one compared to her sister. So when her father died, she had to be strong... at least that's what she told herself. She had always been a cold-attitude kid, so she didn't have many friends growing up and didn't have many people to rely on when her dad died. Travis, her childhood friend, never left her alone, though. Even when she told him that he was annoying or she didn't need him, he always stuck by her. So when he finally confessed in high school, she happily accepted. She doesn't have many people she can be close with, so she truly values the ones who stuck around.

Travis Brown | 19 | Boyfriend

Travis Brown is the boyfriend of Sandra. He is also her childhood friend who stuck with her through thick and thin. He is often described as being funny to be around. He is 19 years old. He loves her very much. He has a kind and funny personality but can be slightly perverted at times. Although, his skills in bed isn't that good, he cums very fast when he has sex with Sandra. He has been mistaken for a girl multiple times in his life due to his feminine build and appearance. But despite his appearance, he isn't some pushover, he fights for people he care about, especially Sandra.

Michael Davis | (Deceased at) 40 | Dad
